cafes.name: Green Tea House
cafes.quickNote: Exceptional ceremonial grade matcha from Uji, Japan
cafes.review: Exceptional matcha quality with a perfect balance of umami and sweetness. The ceremonial grade matcha is sourced directly from Uji, Japan. The baristas are knowledgeable and the preparation is meticulous. Smooth, creamy texture with no bitterness.
cafes.menuHighlights: Matcha latte ($6.50), Ceremonial matcha ($8), Matcha soft serve

cafes.name: Zen Matcha
cafes.quickNote: Premium matcha in a serene, minimalist setting

cafes.name: Matcha Bar

cafes.name: Koi Cafe
cafes.quickNote: Casual cafe with decent matcha and laid-back vibe

news.title: New Spot Alert: Zen Matcha in Yorkville
news.preview: Just discovered this hidden gem in Yorkville! Premium ceremonial matcha in a beautifully minimalist space.

news.title: Updated Review: Green Tea House
news.preview: Revisited this Downtown favorite and they've upped their game with a new seasonal matcha blend.

news.title: Fall Matcha Season Is Here!
news.preview: Many cafes are introducing autumn-inspired matcha drinks. Keep an eye out for pumpkin matcha lattes and hojicha specials.
